name: Multi-Agent Trust Verifier
description: Verifies trust between agents by checking goal alignment, spend limits, action scope, and detecting goal drift. Covers OWASP ASI01 Agent Goal Hijack — the #1 ranked agentic security risk. Pay-per-request via x402.
capabilities: Verify goal alignment between proposed action and original goal
Enforce spend limits across agent delegations
Detect high-risk actions (delete, transfer funds, escalate privileges)
Return trust score, goal alignment score, and approve/deny/escalate
